name: atlas
description: Open-source local-first cognitive memory with AGM-compliant belief revision and automatic downstream reassessment (Ripple). 13 MCP tools for adjudication, lineage, working memory, and tenant sharing.
author: Richard Schefren

prerequisites.name: Neo4j 5.26+
prerequisites.instructions: docker compose up -d (uses the docker-compose.yml in the Atlas repo)

tools.name: ripple.analyze_impact
tools.description: Preview the downstream Depends_On cascade for a revised kref.

tools.name: ripple.reassess
tools.description: Compute reassessment proposals after a confidence shift.

tools.name: ripple.detect_contradictions
tools.description: Type-aware contradiction detection over reassessment proposals.

tools.name: adjudication.queue
tools.description: List pending adjudication entries from the Obsidian markdown queue.

tools.name: adjudication.resolve
tools.description: Apply Rich's decision via AGM operator. Closes the loop.

tools.name: quarantine.upsert
tools.description: Push a CandidateClaim into the trust quarantine.

tools.name: ledger.verify_chain
tools.description: Walk the SHA-256 hash chain from genesis and verify integrity.

tools.name: working_memory.assemble
tools.description: Letta-style working memory: assemble Atlas's pinned blocks (Human, Persona, CurrentPriorities) into a context string for an agent.

tools.name: lineage.walk
tools.description: Walk SUPPORTS edges backward from a Decision to surface the belief chain.

tools.name: sharing.grant
tools.description: Multi-tenant: grant tenant B read access to tenant A's kref.

tools.name: sharing.list_grants
tools.description: List sharing grants per granter or grantee tenant.
